MINI MINUTES: Judge Peter J. Busch; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Larissa Troche.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Keith Jones is present.
Attorney Yuri Gottesman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of OCT-07-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
